policyname: Advisors can view client domicile analysis
qual:
(user_id IN ( SELECT h.owner_id
   FROM (households h
     JOIN advisor_clients ac ON ((ac.client_id = h.owner_id)))
  WHERE ((ac.advisor_id = auth.uid()) AND (ac.status = 'active'::text) AND (ac.accepted_at IS NOT NULL))))

with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM advisor_clients
  WHERE ((advisor_clients.advisor_id = auth.uid()) AND (advisor_clients.client_id = domicile_analysis.user_id) AND (advisor_clients.status = 'active'::text))))

qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM advisor_clients
  WHERE ((advisor_clients.advisor_id = auth.uid()) AND (advisor_clients.client_id = domicile_analysis.user_id) AND (advisor_clients.status = 'active'::text))))
